entry.title: Inquiring about maximum number of custom fields
entry.content:
What is the maximum number of custom text fields


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiring about maximum number of custom fields
entry.content:
Using PDI or KUT in any client, if you create more than or equal to 744 extension fields in a standard BO node, the system displays an error message

Please find the details about Extension Field Limit in the below link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/75fe9c36cdf14bf09816da3acf7d94f2.html

entry.title: Re: VF31: how to excluce cancelled billing documents
entry.content: Didn't you find this answer during your search, or the solution doesn't satisfy you?

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
This sounds identical to a problem users frequently face when using the SAP Cloud ALM APIs for the first time. The root cause is usually related to the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance not being assigned the necessary authorization scopes. It happens so frequently, we have a KBA on that topic: 3425859 - '403 Forbidden' when testing SAP Cloud ALM outbound APIs

Have you verified that the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Key you are using has the correct scopes in its Service Instance? The KBA above points to another document with instructions on how to find out what scopes are currently assigned to a Service Instance.

I checked the SAP EnableNow documentation and it mentions that at least the following scopes should be assigned to the Service Instance: 

  • calm-api.documents.read
  • calm-api.documents.write
  • calm-api.processauthoring.delete
  • calm-api.processauthoring.read
  • calm-api.processauthoring.write
  • calm-api.processmanagement.delete
  • calm-api.processmanagement.read
  • calm-api.processmanagement.write
  • calm-api.projects.read
  • calm-api.projects.write

entry.title: Re: Advanced Test Orchestration and Tester assignment using Test Plans in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
New Test Plan Status filter in Test Execution to simplify access to relevant test cases:

Introducing the new "Test Plan Status" filter in Test Executions app in SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Mr11 GR/IR
entry.content:
Hello, hopefully a solution can be found. 
Im having an issue during posting by using mr11. 
im trying to balance an old purchase order while  the gr document is archived. The system displays an error message “internal error in program BUILD_UP_POSTINGS_VALUES on position 5.”
Message No. CKMLGRIR00. 

Can someone assist?

Thank you.

entry.title: Description is not appearing for search help field
entry.content:
Hello, I created a custom report in custom analytical queries tile using a CDS (Core Data Services) view, the description for some fields is not appearing in the search filter .

Here i also included text field in custom cds view for that search help field , but still description field is not displaying in custom analytical queries.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud Network Security: Best Practices for IP Allowlisting and Access Control
entry.content: I would also mentioned that it is possible to add IP address restrictions at user group level (see https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-security-guide/connect-restrictions )

entry.title: Re: Mr11 GR/IR
entry.content:
Hello @ben1350 

Consider the note 2655382 - MR11: Error in BUILD_UP_POSTING_VALUES If MAA and ML are active

If that doesn't resolve the problem, report it to SAP support.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is nee...
entry.content: I did try PFKEY  parameter . it is not helping in find option within my tree.

entry.title: SOLMAN TR MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Key points:

  • TR creation
  • TR management SE01, SE09, Transport copies and logs
  • TR movement - STMS
  • TR reimport - basis
  • Recapture objects in another TR - unlock objects locked in other TR using SE03 then activate objects to capture in new T. It will ask for TR to capture the objects again.
  • TR decoupling 
  • TR failed to move with error "error occurred during post handling RS_AFTER_IMPORT" FOR *L - IT IS BECAUSE QUALITY HAS DATA LOADED IN TARGETS AS WE HAVE MADE CHANGES OR ADDED OR REMOVE FIELDS IN TRANSFORMATION THE DATA TARGETS IN QUALITY SHOULD BE CLEANED.

entry.title: Posting to two different GL accounts and also to S-Partner during Cross company bookings
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we want to post different types of cross company bookings to different GL Accounts and sometimes even directly to the S-Partner.

We have setup OBYA where we have a clearing account 123

Now, we would like to have different cases between the same combination of company codes.

Example

For cross company automatic bookings between US01 and US04

Type A automatic bookings have to be posted to account 123

For Type B to account 224

Type C directly on the S-Partner.

Is this possible

entry.title: Re: BusinessObject DEV CMS DB deleted .How to refresh it...
entry.content: I am not able to Create SIA. I am getting below Error : 33007 CMS system database is overloaded, please try again. If the problem persists, please contact the system administrator(FWB 00027) 35101 The root server reported an error Initialization Failure. (Reason: CMS system database is overloaded, please try again. If the problem persists, please contact the system administrator(FWB 00027)CMS system database is overloaded, please try again. If the problem persists, please contact the system administrator(FWB 00027) CacheObjectIDs ).

entry.title: Activating the feature ID FTGL_500717 for new Resource-Related Intercompany Billing
entry.content:
Upon checking of the road map for intercompany billing, Planned Q1 2025 there is Activation of new resource-related intercompany billing using SSCUI. could you please confirm the following:
1. Does the activation of the new solution will be automatically activated on Q1 2025?
2. What will happen if we will not proceed on activating the new solution? Does the old solution can still be use?
3. Is it required to activate the new solution?

entry.title: Facing error when creating MTO Production Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Communitiy members,

I'm testing the process of MTO in our partner system, but we are facing error when checking the Material in the production order.

 



This is the error message that I'm facing now.

When I jump to configuration side, 

Availability key both 1 and 2 is exists in our system.
Can you give any advice why I'm facing this error when creating production order?

(I'm testing in the partner environment, so Availability key configuration side is provided by SAP)

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @RajKishoreUppala welcome to SAP Community. As you are tuning in from the US, I would like to point to the already existing Location Group in Americas. These groups are designed to connect local people. There are also physical events from time to time for knowledge sharing and networking.

Furthermore, these video series might help you to understand the SAP Community better: Discover the SAP Community - How-To Video Series

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Glad to have you as such an experienced person on board @RajKishoreUppala 

I also mentioned some tipps & tricks in my comment to your other reply. See: https://community.sap.com/t5/welcome-corner-discussions/sap-community-where-are-you-from/m-p/13936708/highlight/true#M9670 😊

entry.title: Control Restart Condition of Flexible workflow for Purchase Contract in S/4HANA (Public cloud)
entry.content:
flexible workflow for Purchase Contract in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud Edition.

Workflow setting in "Manage Workflow for Purchase Contract" App is configured for Document type WK Value Contract. Approver determination is provided as specific set of users.

I have tested below situations where WF is triggered/Restarted even for Approved Contracts.

Business requirement is to ONLY start the workflow in case of Contract target value is INCREASED. Rest of all Standard conditions which SAP is considering needs to be ignored for Workflow Retrigger/Restart.

 

Contract value increased

WF triggered

Contract value decreased

WF triggered

Contract item added

WF triggered

Contract item deleted

WF triggered

Contract item Qty changed

WF not triggered

Contract header Incoterm changed

WF triggered

Supplier Material number changed

WF triggered

Contract description changed

WF triggered

Purchasing group changed

WF triggered

Payment term changed

WF triggered

Validity end date changed

WF triggered

Contract item description changed

WF triggered

Attachment added

WF triggered

Enabled Edit mode --> click Save

WF triggered

I have already checked Purchase Contract workflow restart conditions configuration where I dont see other conditions to control (As these are the only SAP Std delivered Conditions)

 

Do I need to achieve this Via BAdI - MM_PUR_S4_CTR_WFL_RESTART (Definition of Conditions to Restart Workflow in Purchase Contracts).

Is there any Standard WF Setting I need to maintain to achieve this requirement ?

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is needed .
entry.content:
You mean FREE_SELECTIONS_DIALOG I suppose.
Can you describe your 'find option' (where it should be displayed, its purpose)

entry.title: Re: EWM x DM integration - PSA stock not read
entry.content:
Hi,
Actually i don't get any message in SLG1 or STR_UTIL (transcation to check the web service message output).
I've done both the web service configuration and the customizing as the hel giude suggest: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/9020575faae645b8ae3679f93bd2e075.html?locale=en-US

I've also tried to put breakpoints through out the Badi, but it seems not to be called form the EWM-DM interface (i'm talking about this Badi /SCWM/EX_EWM_HU_CHG and this two enhanchement spot /SCWM/ESI_EWM_HU_CHG and /SCWM/ESI_STOCK_MOVEMENT_NOTIF).

As you can see my stock is set as Syncronized:

And my storage type are set as K.

If you have any suggestion, it would be great!

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN 7.2 software required for new installation

SS

entry.title: message no M7042. Batch does not exist?
entry.content:
Hello SAP - Friends,

I have an issue. I would like to close old inspection lots for incoming goods, but if I use transaction QA11 then message no. 7042 comes, that the batch does not exist ?
How can I close it? In the transaction MSC1N I cannot define batch too.
We are speaking about very old inspection lots.

Thanks a lot for your support.

Br:

david

entry.title: Re: Download ALV Report to excel file with expand/collaps...
entry.content:
If the expand/collapse functions for rows only, there is a standard program that caters the functionality. You can refer the link below.

BCALV_TEST_GRID

Expand and collapse total lines in ABAP ALV grid d... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is nee...
entry.content: Do not use Answer to respond to a comment or answer. Answer is intended to be used to propose a solution to the initial question. Use Comment on the initial question or on any answer instead.

entry.title: Re: How to add Subtotal button to ALV IDA toolbar report?
entry.content: Hello did anyone find how to handle that collapse/expand button or subtotal?

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Licensing: What You Need to Know about Mobile Services Entitlement
entry.content:
Dear Alba,

Thanks for this valuable summary.

In the solution diagram, Dynamic Forms are shown in a subaccount separate from the subaccount for Mobile Services. Why is that? Is it not possible to deploy Dynamic Forms in the same subaccount as the Mobile Services? Or is it that you want to highlight that these could be different? One of the installation prerequisites listed in the documentation is "To enable end users to work with forms created by SAP Dynamic Forms, the SAP Dynamic Forms application must be installed in the same SAP BTP Subaccount as the SAP Service and Asset Manager application, used by the end user. is installed on for use by the end user.".  The picture here appears to be contradicting the documentation.  

The use of the term "internal SAP Applications" for referring to "SAP Service & Asset manager" is a little confusing. These are SAP applications to that are generally available for customers. So why qualify these as internal? In the Mobile Services these are called SAP Applications.  

Regards,

Dinu

entry.title: Re: Proposal value field on compensation sheet
entry.content: Xavier! Thank you very much for the information! It is very useful to me!

entry.title: Re: Mr11 GR/IR
entry.content: Thank you. This note refers to “position 2” and not “position 5”. Can you refer to note that relates to my issue? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: F-32 clear customer: Error- Enter the Item number
entry.content:
Hello,

No problem, thank you anyway for your effort. One of SD colleague found out that both down payment items were canceled in the customer order. This means, the order is no longer relevant for down payments in the system and the header cannot be used for reconciliation. 

Best Regards,

Raman

entry.title: Commerce PO in Ariba Invoice Management Solution from Network
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can someone confirm if you have worked on a scenario where a PO originated from non-sap system is sent to Network via Commerce Automation and if we have subscription for Ariba Invoice Management solution instead of Full suite of B&I, is it possible to get the PO copy from Network to Ariba Invoice Management solution? This is to check if we could perform the 2-way or 3-way match in Ariba Invoice Management solution. 

If this is possible, can you please confirm where do we need to look for such kind of configuration? Is it in Ariba Network, Document Routing configuration?

Any leads on this would be much appreciated!

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Re: Upload Plan data using a ‘Starter Button’ in SAC Story from a File (Excel/CSV)
entry.content:
HI Vereendra, 

Thanks for the blog. 

One issue we are finding with the new Upload Starter is that it does not list the error records, which is problematic because end users have no way to understand what's going on. 

In your blog you mention "If there are rejection of records, users can download and correct them", but we don't see this on the data management log:

Is this expected or maybe a limitation? The reason why it fails is because we are uploading a file with new member on a private dimension, so we would expect the system to list the rejected record. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Configuring reciever port for outbound IDOC
entry.content:
Did you read (and apply) SAP suggestion from online documentation

  • Look for 'This wiki provides details on keeping ALE settings, for example the Distribution mode (BD64), ports in Idoc processing (WE21), and Partner Profiles WE20.'

entry.title: Re: XSLT Transformation and standard text for ROUTING_CREATE
entry.content: Do you want to generate (by transformation) another XML file ready to use with IDOC_XML_FROM_FILE or similar tool?

entry.title: SAP Enable Now und IAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have configured IAS as a proxy and am provisioning users from Azure to IAS and then to SAP Enable Now Azure->IAS->. How can roles be automatically assigned to provisioned users in Enable Now ?

Is there something similar to groups/teams in SAP Enable Now, like in SAC, that can be granted access via a role?

Unfortunately, I can't find any information on this.

Many Thanks for any help!

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024
entry.content:
I can only agree with above. This is unprecedented. The QRC4 release is basically coming in 2 days (Nov 15-17) and there is still no QRC4 full-release blog/content available (only this top 5 sneak peek) like it was in the past (min. 3 weeks in advance).
The only option for SAC customers to prepare for what is hitting them is to watch the full +1h video (only released 1week ago and without much announcement).

And as usual: What's new viewer lists nothing new, bugfix release notes simply don't exist, and I'm pretty sure there will be regression surprises (such as KBA 3533963 that was raised after we logged a case).

entry.title: Re: Export Configuration CBC
entry.content:
Hello Annika,

we're currently working on a capability to package configuration in order to re-use this in other tenants or e.g. for other countries at the same customer. First deliveries are currently planned for 2025.

Best Regards Sven Lang

entry.title: Re: 4.3 Web Intelligence Data Lineage Challenge
entry.content:
Thank you Bernhard for engaging on this topic.

In my use case, I am trying to compare results from the two queries.

I used efashion for its familiarity with the users of this forum

In my example, think of State as the unique ID and this is the only column that I have joined on in the creation of the data cube. I therefore want to compare the values being stored in Quarter, Year. If I join on Quarter and Year in the data cube, then the cube only presents a single column. When I don't join on Quarter and Year, it creates separate columns in the cube and this is why I need to clearly identify the lineage. In this scenario, I think Webi has to do better than placing a (1)  after the name of the object. Even it used the original query name in the brackets, it would be clearer. 

As it stands, I am faced with renaming the objects in the cube which is a workaround 

thanks

James

entry.title: Packing Carriers (Returnable Mat.) in Packing unit
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

we face the callenge to pack boxes with a fixed ID on a pallet with a fixed ID. The boxes are filled with SFCs.

Our idea would have been to have for the box a packing unit, which is linked to the carrier (carrier name = box ID). But when we try to pack this box into the pallet packing unit (which is linked to the pallet-carrier with a fixed ID as name), the error "You can only add nonreturnable packing units as content. Packing unit XX has a returnable material type" appears. We try to do the packagin in a production process using "Add content to packing unit".

And we have to use the returnable material type to be able to use carriers (with a fixed id).

Thank you in advance for your response!

entry.title: Re: Hi All,I'm facing a issue in hana xsa project/db build.
entry.content:
Hi Abdul,

can you please add some more details.

This is HANA 2 SP07 with XSA (Version?).

What code did you take from GIT?

How could we reproduce?

Maybe you should open a ticket.

BR Volker

entry.title: Group Reporting - Group currency version reference changes
entry.content:
Hi All,  

Have a query on GC extension version settings change. 

Background:

We have a standard version A10 and one group currency version A20 referring standard version A1. Business had posted some transaction data into both for a period. Now business decided not to use the group currency extension version, and they are requesting us to make it not usable or delete the extension version. Also they have understood that when the CT task is being run in data monitor for standard version A10, Its posting values in A20 as well and they wish to stop automatic postings in A20. 

Considering the fact that versions cannot be deleted we been looking for alternatives stop automatic postings into GC extension version. 

Alternative:

We have changed the reference version values from A10 to Y10 and updated special version values in A20 to match Y10. As part of checks have triggered "Release universal task" in A10 and we are facing error "CX Root error " and data is not getting pulled. 

Please find the task log error screen for reference. 

Please provide any inputs to proceed further. 

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Does SAP DataSphere have a "Business Content" option like SAP BW for ETL processes?
entry.content:
Hi

In SAP BW, there is an option called "Install from Business Content," which provides a built-in module for the entire ETL (Extraction, Transformation, Loading) process for each InfoProviders . SD,MM,FI.... My question is, does SAP DataSphere have a similar feature where we can easily download and install readily available business content for ETL processes? If so, how can we leverage it for quick deployment?


Kumar

entry.title: Re: Posting to two different GL accounts and also to S-Pa...
entry.content:
Did you already try some substitution rule ?

  • Rule condition containing BSEG-KTOSL= 'BUV'

entry.title: Re: Combining orders into one inspection batch
entry.content:
Greetings,

I think in that case it is not possible with standard.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Exceed Budget in posting MIRO Invoice for PR, PO in WBS
entry.content:
Hello guys, I have a problem like this:

1. I created project, WBS level 1 level 2, Network, Activity (internal) and Material Component.

2. I released project and assign budget for the project in cj30, and cj32.

3. I used the PR created in the Material Component to create PO and it charged commitment budget to my WBS and network activity.

4. I post goods receipt and then go to MIRO t-code.

5. I posted invoice for the PO that created from the PR of the material component and the system raise the error: In document item 003 Ntwk actvty 310000057 0010, budget for WBS element O.999987 for fiscal year 2024 was exceeded by 200.000.000 VND.

Although I have budgeted and released the budget for the WBS, there were 200.000.000 VND in the commitment and the MIRO didn't take it and raise the error: Budget Exceed.

Please help me with this problem.

entry.title: Create QM-Notification using BAPI_QUALNOT_CREATE with different partner address
entry.content:
Hello Community,

i am using "BAPI_QUALNOT_CREATE" to create a QM-Notification which is working great.
I fill the table parameter "NOTIFPARTNR" with my partners which also works.

The problem is that i want to change the address for that partner in my QM-Notification.

BAPIS like "BAPI_CUSTOMERRETURN_CREATE" and "SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE" have the table parameter "PARTNERADDRESSES" for exact that reason.

How can i archive changing the address for the partner in my QM-Notification?

Thank you

entry.title: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content:
Dear Experts/Community,
In SAP Process Insights, I want to go from Best Practice to SAP Navigator to see the process flow graphically.
Under "Transformation Planning" - the corresponding process - I get a tabular list of process flows and the corresponding solution process flows. But I can only access the Collaboration Hub from here. However, I would like to use SAP Insights without Intelligence or the Collaboration Hub and display the flow directly in the Navigator. Can anyone help me and tell me if this is possible and if so, how?
Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Export Conditions from mail
entry.content:
Hi Joyca,

This is not possible as you described it. Only the condition name is exported, and will be created again with an import accordingly. The condition rules themselves are only assigned correctly again if the rule in this email with the same name was already created during export. Otherwise the rule(s) must be created again manually. So there is no possibility to see al rules in an overview.

The export/import is only available for the legacy editor. No further plan so far. 

Kind regards, Silvia

entry.title: Re: Combining orders into one inspection batch
entry.content: Thank you)

entry.title: Re: Posting to two different GL accounts and also to S-Pa...
entry.content: Thank you for the reply. I can try substitution for different GL accounts, any suggestions to post directly to S-Partner?

entry.title: Re: Excel add-in with error " There are no Reason code assigned to you " contact your admi
entry.content: kacper.benner@tivtal.com

entry.title: Second standard item as UDF in SAP FSM cloud - Material screen
entry.content:
Hello Folks!

Hope you all are doing good.

I wanted to know if there is a possibility in FSM where we could display standard field which is available in the query DTPO as a UDF in Material screen.

As we know we already have an item as standard in material screenconfig, I am trying to add another item_2 as a UDF and trying to display a value which is already available in cloud as standard, but the value can only be fetched by Joining multiple tables.\

The scenario in short - We are selecting a material to return back to warehouse from an installed location. Suppose A is the material which we are going to install with serial number 1 and then if we choose defect serial number which we are going to take back - we will only see the defct serial number / the equipment as standard, but this serial / equipment has an item number which we are trying to display as a UDF.

Please let me know if this is possible or any alternate thoughts in mind to do the same.

Attaching images and query which I am trying to do for your reference:

SELECT e.serialNumber, i.code FROM Equipment e JOIN Item i on i.id = e.item

e.serial number is the one which I will choose in the FSM app material screen as defect serial number / equipment in standard.

I want to display the i.code field with the help of UDF if it is possible.

ScreenConfig which I tried creating an UDF with visible expression as the above query. Please help me / correct me as I see the expression is not valid for the config.

Any pointers and help are much appreciated, Thanks in Advance!

 

 

Best Regards

Dhanush

entry.title: Hide Key in SAC table using script
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to only show the text property of a dimension in a SAC table. The enduser can toggle dimensions in a Checkbox group, but although the key is hidden in the table to start with, it is always displayed after the script has displayed the dimension again.

In my attempt, I only add the text for one dimension and the key and text for the other dimensions, but in both cases the IF statement gives exactly the same result, i.e. both key and text are displayed.

Example code:

//LOOP OVER SELECTED KEYS
for (var i=0; i<selectedRows.length; i++){
var selectedKey = selectedRows[i];
var selectedKeyText = selectedKey + ".LONG_TEXT";

if(!currentDimensions.includes(selectedKey)){
if(selectedKey.includes("<dimension>")){
dailytable.addDimensionToRows(selectedKey);
dailytable.setActiveDimensionProperties(selectedKey, [selectedKeyText]);
} else {
dailytable.addDimensionToRows(selectedKey);
dailytable.setActiveDimensionProperties(selectedKey, [selectedKey, selectedKeyText]);
}
}
}//END OF LOOP

entry.title: Re: SAP variant configuration learning suggestion
entry.content:
Well, to start with VC and you want to implement in product design, first step is to list out the number of machine models in your organization and list down the standard specifications and optional features offered in your machines. You should be having clear understanding of what is a standard feature and an optional feature. Also, clear definition of Class & characteristic. Basic t-codes required for VC.

Understand the basic difference between Precondition, Procedure dependencies and start writing the syntax by reference examples. Test in CU50 transaction whether it is behaving correctly or not,

entry.title: Re: Download ALV Report to excel file with expand/collaps...
entry.content: This blog post does a workaround by adding columns with buttons expand and collapse inside the ALV Grid (code based on CL_GUI_ALV_GRID). How did you solve for the "download to Excel" part?

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is nee...
entry.content: If you tried PFKEY before asking the question, please edit it and explain everything you tried, to avoid asking you what you have already tried.

entry.title: Re: Create Hierarchies in a automatic way SAC
entry.content: Can you be more specific please?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA - Central Finance: A Complete understanding about Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi Ines


If you are asking about the SAP Licensing for CFIN, for on Prem and RISE the pricing metric is the company's revenue.  Customers should reach out to the SAP account team or resellers for more information.

thanks

gino

entry.title: Re: Configuring reciever port for outbound IDOC
entry.content:
hello,
thank you for your reply. I have checked the link that you have sent. I ve tried to execute first step '' model distribute on edit tab.
I got this error message. any advice?

Should i delete the pre-created entries before? I created them manually to add ''shpmnt'' message type on Q system. 
Before QHOCLNT300 there was only PHO which was copied from P.

entry.title: Need to pre allocate stock for a customer in S4Hana public cloud
entry.content:
How can we pre allocate stock for a specific customer before creating a sales order in SAP S4 public cloud? 

You have this requirement for a customer that does not allow partial delivery and it is a valuable customer for the company and hence you would like to pre allocate stock for some materials for this customer.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to pre allocate stock for a customer in S4Hana p...
entry.content:
In cases companies do not want to sell their articles according to the sequence of the incoming sales orders, rather they want to reserve certain quantities for special groups and perhaps they also want to assign priorities to these groups the solution is the usage of Supply protection (SUP). It can be is used to protect a group against the demand of other groups and also to prioritize the demand.

For more details about this functionality and how to setup this in your system please read the SAP-Help for Supply Protection (SUP) : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/c4b704762cbd4611a3ee2dc00c7a7277.html?locale=en-US&version=2408.500

entry.title: SAP FICO Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am preparing for FICO certification doing practice and i need guidance how to apply for exam and any book suggestion for SAP FICO.

also kindly suggest how to move to SAP FICO Team am part of financial team for 12 years

 

Regards,

Sairam.N

entry.title: Re: End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition
entry.content:
hi all , 

GLN number option is not available on SBN while configuring Peppol.Any advice on this?

entry.title: Titular/NombreRazon empty in SII XML for Spain
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

In the XML for SII Spain, the field <n1:Titular> <n1:NombreRazon/> is empty, therefore our files are rejected. 

From my understanding, this field corresponds to the name of the company.

Our configuration seems complete for Statutory reporting (SSCUI 101071), Additional parameters (SSCUI 102739) and Organizational structure.

Do you know where the value for NombreRazon is taken?

Thank you for your help. 

Kind regards,

Anaïs

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA endroutine clienthandling
entry.content:
Hi

As BW is not allowing the adjustment of the method definitions of the generated AMDP class of the Transformation, I think one option is to create a custom AMDP class, which has the required "CDS SESSION CLIENT" parameter in the method, that reads the CDS view.

Then this custom AMDP class and its corresponding reading method can be called from the Endroutine to get the result.

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: How to write unit test for groovy script with messageLogFactory?
entry.content: Thank you.

Hello,

thank you for your reply. but i could not find out how to configure the port with this path?

I am looking for a customization actually, to get proper port(A00000x) instead of QHO

entry.title: Re: Posting to two different GL accounts and also to S-Pa...
entry.content: I'm not sure whether using a business partner account as a clearing account (GL) is allowed by SAP (I've never dared to override the posting key).

entry.title: Re: Open Hub added fields avoid data reload
entry.content: You have to physically delete the data in the remote database. I think you should ask the database administrator of the remote database to do this for you.

entry.title: Re: Handling Sales Order Restrictions When Planned Orders...
entry.content:
Dear Vivek,

Please make use of extensibility to build the validation.

BADI such as Check of Sales Documents Before Saving can be used.

Regards

Sahil Grover

__PRESENT

entry.title: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in SAP maintained table
entry.content:
Do SAP consider changes made in T Code: BS22 as custom modifications or SAP allows customers to make changes in this SAP Maintained table and consider it as Standard configuration?

I0045 TECO Technically completed

Standard setup provided for TECO is that a TECO'ed Production Order cannot be used in a Purchase Order.

But Business want to use a TECO Production Order in a Purchase Order, and to achieve this we should change the standard setting from "Forbidden" to "Allowed" in BS22.

I want to know whether this is allowed by SAP or do SAP consider this as custom modification and will stop supporting in this area after we make this change.

entry.title: Re: 4.3 Web Intelligence Data Lineage Challenge
entry.content:
From your answer i understand that your basic problem is to understand why the join only delivers one row instead of multiple rows which you would expect - right?

Here it depends on the BI Release Version you are running. We had once a similar issue, where the "left join" had a bug that cutted off all results after the first result. This was a confirmed bug by SAP and since 4.3 SP04 P06 (?) this is fixed and working as it should.

If that sounds familiar to your problem, check your release version and this SAP Note:

3462675 - Left Join in Web Intelligence data mode do not return correct results if keys are duplicated in secondary table (One to many relationship) - SAP for Me

BR Bernhard

entry.title: Re: How do I reset RSMDATASTATE after a load to a Datamar...
entry.content: I would suggest to go through the KBA-s which I provided earlier.

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN TR MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
What exactly is the detailed error message that you are getting? In which after import method does it fail?

Also check:

BW After Import - Transport - Troubleshooting

entry.title: Re: Simplified invoices in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editi...
entry.content:
Hi Javier,

If you are referring to https://api.sap.com/api/CE_POS_SALES_TRANS_CREATE_REQ_IN/overview 

Then please activate scope item https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/3HV?region=DE to activate the communication arrangement.

Regards

Sahil Grover

entry.title: Dynamic URL in Fiori Overview page link cards
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to set dynamic URL in Fiori Overview page link cards which will be different for each tenant (root of the URL will be different).

E.g. from manifest.json

...
"cards": {
"linkCard1": {
"model": "mainModel",
"sequencePos": 1,
"template": "sap.ovp.cards.linklist",
"settings": {
"title": "Card Title",
"showFilterInHeader": true,
"showBasicSearch": true,
"listFlavor": "standard",
"entitySet": "Links",
"staticContent": [
{
   "title": "APP URL title",
   "subTitle": "",
   "imageUri": "sap-icon://chart-table-view",
   "imageAltText": "APP URL title",
   "targetUri": "${tenantUrl}/someAddress",
   "openInNewWindow": true
},
...

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Upload Plan data using a ‘Starter Button’ in SAC Story from a File (Excel/CSV)
entry.content:
Hi hector_andres_garcia,

This seems to be a new error. Please check below note. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003537263

Usually, when there are rejections, it will provide the list in excel and we can analyze records by downloading them. Could try upload the file through Data management and import file option? whether you are getting any errors with it?

Thanks,

Veerendra

entry.title: Re: SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud : Invoice value in Intrastat
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for the answer.
Unfortunately a custom field would not work well in my case because that value would then have to be reused in other processes. I would need to modify the invoice value field.

Best regards,

Cristina

entry.title: Key figures in app "Product Profitability with Production Variances"
entry.content:
About app "Product Profitability with Production Variances"，How to add Key Figures for Product Profitability with Production Variances ？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Key figures in app "Product Profitability with Produc...
entry.content:
Most key figures, except production variances, are based on semantic tags. Journal entries are assigned to different G/L accounts with different categories, like revenue or cost. Please make sure that all semantic tags listed in the table (in the link below) are assigned to the correct accounts, otherwise the measures cannot be calculated correctly. The assignment of semantic tags to accounts depends on the financial statement version (FSV). You can assign semantic tags directly to accounts or to the financial statement item (FS item). SAP provides the assignment of semantic tags to the default <FSV YPS2>.

Please check the SAP help portal link below for more details:

Key Figures for Product Profitability with Production Variances.

entry.title: Re: How to call SAP ByDesign API from S4HANA Cloud System
entry.content:
Dear Khaing,

Can you have a look at the blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/outbound-communication-from-cloud-to-on-premise-in-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13540015

In this blog a API is called in a BADI to validate data .

Regards

Sahil Grover

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Alternative Reconciliation Account for Customer
entry.content: hello , reconcilation account still goes to FI document from customer master data, not according to 100297 configuration... i need to set reconcilliation account according to channel

entry.title: Learn how to transition from SAP Enterprise Portal to SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
As our business grows and adapts, it’s essential that the platforms we use to connect, collaborate, and enhance productivity keep pace. 

 

SAP Enterprise Portal is the web front-end component for the SAP NetWeaver platform. Thousands of customers around the world are still using SAP Enterprise Portal to provide their employees, customers, and partners a central and intuitive access point to business applications, information, and services. If you are one of those customers, then you should consider the following dates: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 will be supported in mainstream maintenance until end of 2027 with extended maintenance until end of 2030. 

For more information, see SAP NetWeaver 7.5 Maintenance Strategy.  

 

As a general strategic approach of how to proceed as an EP customer, we recommend to transition your SAP Enterprise Portal use cases to SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), multi-cloud environment and in particular to SAP Build Work Zone  We're thrilled to announce our transition from SAP Enterprise Portal to SAP Build Work Zone, an upgraded digital experience offering greater functionality, streamlined workflows, and a more intuitive interface tailored for today’s dynamic workplace. 

 

In this post, we’ll outline what this transition entails, highlight the major enhancements, and provide guidance on maximizing the potential of SAP Build Work Zone. 

 

Why Transition to SAP Build Work Zone? 

SAP Build Work Zone offers significant improvements over SAP Enterprise Portal, which has served us well but now limits our evolving needs. SAP Build Work Zone seamlessly integrates with the latest SAP solutions, providing powerful productivity tools, embedded collaboration features, and simplified customization options. Key benefits include: 

  • Enhanced Collaboration: SAP Build Work Zone integrates collaborative tools directly into workflows, making it easier to connect with colleagues and share information effortlessly. 
  • Personalized Experience: SAP Build Work Zone allows users to personalize their dashboards, making it simple to access the most relevant content and tools. 
  • Unified Access to Applications: With seamless integration to SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors, and other cloud solutions, Work Zone provides a single access point to essential tools and data. 

 

Key Differences Between SAP Enterprise Portal and SAP Build Work Zone 

Feature 

SAP Enterprise Portal 

SAP Build Work Zone 

Collaboration 

Limited 

Robust collaboration tools, including SAP Jam and Teams integration 

Customization 

Complex, limited options 

Highly customizable, intuitive for users and admins 

Integration with SAP S/4HANA 

Basic 

Deep, native integration 

User Experience 

Traditional portal-based 

Modern, mobile-optimized, and user-centric 

Cloud Readiness 

Mostly on-premise 

Fully cloud-based solution 

 

 

Getting Started with SAP Build Work Zone 

We’ve aimed for a smooth transition to SAP Build Work Zone. Here’s a quick start guide to help you get up and running: 

  1. Accessing SAP Build Work Zone 
    SAP Build Work Zone is accessible through a new URL, but your login credentials will remain the same. Simply navigate to the new link and sign in with your existing credentials. 
  1. Customizing Your Page 
    On your first login, you’ll have the option to personalize your page. Add widgets to quickly access essential applications, notifications, and favorite content. 
  1. Exploring Integrated Tools 
    SAP Build Work Zone connects seamlessly with collaboration platforms like Microsoft Teams and Sharepoint, along with productivity tools in the SAP suite. Take some time to explore these integrations to help streamline your daily workflows. 
  1. Navigating Workspaces and Groups 
    Workspaces in SAP Build Work Zone replace certain functions previously available in Enterprise Portal pages. Within Workspaces, you can create content, engage in discussions, and share documents with your team. We encourage you to join your department’s workspace and explore available resources. 
  1. Using Knowledge Bases and Widgets 
    The SAP Build Work Zone knowledge base provides quick access to frequently used documents, guides, and tools. Widgets further personalize your experience by offering instant access to the apps and dashboards most relevant to your role. 

 

We will use this blog as an initial resource, with additional blog posts and knowledge base articles to support you throughout your transition journey. 

Link to the guide: Guide

 

Learn more: 

 SAP Build Work Zone on: sap.com / SAP Community 
Discovery Center missions: standard / advanced edition 
SAP Build Work Zone on SAP PartnerEdge 

 

Leaning Journeys 

Check out the dedicated unit for SAP Build Work Zone in the learning journey: Compose and Automate with SAP Build the No-Code Way. 
Understanding the core capabilities of SAP Build Work Zone in "Designing SAP Build Work Zone". 
For more deep dive technical information, check out "Implement and Administer SAP Build Work Zone". 

 

Join also the SAP Builders group and engage with a community of peers to unleash innovation by building apps, process automations, and creating business sites. 

 Enjoy!!

entry.title: Re: Passing UTM parameters from source URL to reporting (...
entry.content: Anyone with an update to the above question?

entry.title: Upgrade : SAPKB70208
entry.content:
Hello

We use Rev-Trac to import transports between our different systems. Rev-Trac, with its OOPS tool, allows us to check the consistency of data and objects. We recently encountered a problem with OOPS, which was due to a difference in package support levels.


In our ECC System, we have: 4 systems for DEV, QUAL, PreProd and Un prod.
D10, Q10, U10 and P10
In 2011: the two systems U10 and P10 have been upgraded from SAPKB70207 (Basis Support Package 07 for 7.02 Imported on 14.06.2011 )
  to SAPKB70208 and then to 
SAPKB73101 (SAP_BASIS 731: SP 0001 Imported on 16.10.2012 )
the two Dev and Quality systems did not upgrade to SAPKB70208, they have been upgraded directly from SAPKB70207 to SAPKB73101 without going through SAPKB70208 .

Can SAPKB70208 be upgraded?

entry.title: Re: DMO with System Move - the use case to change PAS host during DMO
entry.content:
SUM DMO with System Move Parallel Mode Windows to Linux Data Synchronization

Source system details:

SAP : EHP 5 for SAP ERP 6.0

OS: WIndows 2012

DB: Oracle 19C

Target

SAP : S4HANA 2023 FPS02

OS: Suse Linux

DB: HANA DB

The SUM guide only mentioned Linux-to-Linux data synchronization; it does not mention Windows-to-Linux data sync in parallel mode. We are reiterating the same question, which the SUM guide doesn't comply with.

The information that we seek is not provided in the SMO guide.

Hence can you please guide on how to approach DMO with System move Parallel mode SUM directory automated copy from Source WIndows to Linux platform.

entry.title: Migration of OpenText systems from On-premise data center to AWS Public Cloud
entry.content:
Migration of OpenText systems from On-premise data center to AWS Public Cloud :

 

  1. Initial Assessment and Planning:
  • Identify Components: List all OpenText components in use (e.g., Content Server, AppWorks) and document architecture and dependencies.
  • Determine Cloud Requirements: Define cloud requirements for application servers, NFS storage, and archived data migration.
  • Choose AWS Services: Identify AWS services to use, such as AWS Application Migration Service (MGN) for replicating application servers, S3 for archival storage, and Snowball for data transfer if needed.
  1. Architect the Target AWS Environment
  • Networking: Set up a VPC with subnets, security groups, and NACLs, configuring secure and isolated environments for application components.
  • Storage Solutions: 
  • Plan to use:
    1. Amazon S3 for OpenText archival storage.
    2. Amazon EFS or FSx for Lustre if NFS shares are required by OpenText applications.
    3. Snowball or Data Box if there’s a large amount of archived data.
  • Compute Resources: Choose appropriate EC2 instances to host OpenText application servers.
  • Database Options: If using an OpenText-supported database, consider Amazon RDS for easier management and scalability.
  • IAM Roles and Permissions: Define roles for data and server access, ensuring appropriate permissions for each service.
  1. Setup AWS Application Migration Service (MGN) for Server Replication
  • Install MGN Agents: Install MGN agents on all on-prem OpenText application servers.
  • Configure Replication Settings: Set up MGN with replication settings (e.g., subnet, security group, instance type) to ensure correct configuration in the AWS environment.
  • Start Replication: Initiate the replication process, which allows continuous data sync until the cutover phase.
  • Test Replicated Servers: After replication, test the servers in AWS using MGN's testing feature to confirm functionality and performance.
  1. Migrate NFS Data
  • Set up Storage in AWS:
    1. Amazon EFS: Use Amazon EFS for file system storage compatible with NFS if the OpenText application requires persistent file storage.
    2. S3 or Snowball: For large datasets, consider using AWS Snowball to transfer data to S3 or EFS for NFS-based access.
    3. Data Sync: Use AWS DataSync or rsync tools to copy and sync NFS data from on-premise to EFS or other AWS storage options.
  • Validate Data Integrity: Check for data consistency and completeness after migration.
  1. Archive Data Migration to Amazon S3
  • Storage Bucket Setup: Create S3 buckets to store OpenText archived data.
  • Data Transfer Options:
    1. Direct Transfer: For smaller data volumes, use the internet to upload data directly from on-prem to S3.
    2. AWS Snowball: For large archives, order an AWS Snowball device, copy the data onto it, and ship it back to AWS for import into S3.
    3. Data Validation: Verify archived data in S3 after migration and test OpenText Archive Center’s access to ensure smooth integration.
    4. Testing and Validation
  • Functional Testing: Test all OpenText components on AWS to ensure they are fully functional and compatible in the new environment.
  • Performance Testing: Conduct load testing on OpenText applications to validate that performance meets expected standards in AWS.
  • Security and Compliance: Conduct security checks to validate IAM roles, network security, and encryption configurations.
  1. Cutover and Final Migration Steps
  • Finalize MGN Replication: For application servers, perform a final sync with MGN and initiate a cutover to AWS.
  • DNS Update and Network Configuration: Update DNS to redirect traffic to AWS instances and configure any necessary VPNs or Direct Connect for hybrid setups.
  • Final NFS Data Sync: Perform a last sync of NFS data if required to capture recent changes.
  • Switch Production Traffic: Redirect production traffic to the AWS-hosted OpenText instances and monitor closely for any issues.
  1. Post-Migration Tasks and Optimization
  • Monitoring and Alerts: Set up Amazon CloudWatch for continuous monitoring and alerting of all OpenText components.
  • Backup Configuration: Implement regular backups for EC2 instances, EFS, and S3 data to ensure disaster recovery readiness.
  • Optimize Costs and Resources: Review resource utilization, resize instances as necessary, and configure S3 lifecycle policies to manage storage costs.
  • Documentation and Training: Document the AWS architecture, migration steps, and new operational procedures.

 

By following  the above steps, we can migrate OpenText systems from  on-premise data center to AWS, with MGN handling application server replication, NFS data sync to AWS storage, and S3 or Snowball accommodating the archive storage needs.

 

Please note for Oracle DB , Upgrade the Oracle version to 19c and also upgrade Open Text version before migrating to AWS.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP and Third-Party Cookies Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi @EunSeok_Bang,

indeed, trusted domains and frame ancestors play a crucial role when setting up iframe integrations. However, they are unrelated to cookie access across domain boundaries. As outlined above, you are effected if you have integrated content (e.g., IFrames) served from different domains.

Note that if you are using the managed application router with SAP Build Workzone, then your content might be served from the same domain as your SAP Build Workzone instance. However, note that there might be other integration scenarios of your applications.

Thus, I recommend testing your specific scenario(s), and determine if you are affected as outlined in our blog posts.

entry.title: Re: Warning messages in single processing becomes error m...
entry.content:
Hi 

Even I have got same issues with BP mass process.

DQ(Data quality) check box at validation and activation step need to be unchecked in process template step

In my case it was coming at validation step because of DQ check.

 

Regards,

Pooja.
